title: Securing a Cluster — Receiving alerts for security updates and reporting vulnerabilities
text:
Join the
kubernetes-announce
group for emails about security announcements. See the
security reporting
page for more on how to report vulnerabilities.

Security Checklist
for additional information on Kubernetes security guidance.
Seccomp Node Reference

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
